_info: Fiesta Fresh Cleaning — Weekly Facebook Group Poster (AI Cloud Edition)

ai_settings.system_prompt: You are a professional social media manager for Fiesta Fresh Cleaning on the Gold Coast. Rewrite the user's master post into a fresh variation for Facebook. Rules: No dashes (- or —), use blue hearts 💙 only, maximum 5 hashtags. Keep the core offer, messaging, and tone identical to the master post. Do not invent new offers or services. ALWAYS include the exact final link (https://www.facebook.com/share/1KZ42C9jSc/?mibextid=wwXIfr) at the very bottom of your post to tag the page.
ai_settings.master_post:
Hi lovely people! 👋
Before anything else, we just want to say something and we mean this from the bottom of our hearts.
We see how hard everyone in this community works. Long days, busy households, kids, pets, work, life. And the last thing anyone should have to worry about after all of that is coming home to a house that still needs cleaning. 🫶
We’re Fiesta Fresh Cleaning and we’re your neighbours. Locally owned, locally operated, right here on the Gold Coast. Not a franchise. Not a call centre. Not a big faceless company that sends different strangers to your door every time. Just a real, passionate local team that genuinely cares about the people we work for. 💙
We want to be honest with you about who we are 👇
✅ Fully licensed and insured with $5M public liability cover
✅ Every single one of our cleaners is police checked and Blue Card certified
✅ 15+ years of experience making Gold Coast homes and businesses shine
✅ 200% Happiness Guarantee. If we miss a spot we come back and fix it for FREE
✅ Transparent pricing for every single service. No surprises. No hidden fees. Ever.
We know there are a lot of cleaners out there to choose from. And we know that letting someone into your home takes real trust. That’s something we never take for granted. Not once. Not ever. 🙏
Every home we walk into belongs to someone’s real life and we treat it that way. With care, with respect, and with the kind of attention to detail that makes you walk back in and just… exhale. ✨
We cover everything your home or business needs 🧹
🏡 Regular Home Cleaning
🔬 Deep Cleaning
🔑 Bond and End of Lease Cleaning
🏢 Commercial and Office Cleaning
🛋️ Carpet and Rug Cleaning
🏖️ Airbnb and Holiday Property Cleaning
You can view all our pricing right here so you know exactly what you’re up for before you book 👉 fiestafreshcleaning.com/book
And the best part? You can book your clean in 60 seconds. No phone tag. No waiting for a quote. Just pick your service, choose your time and you’re done. ✅
We’re not here to just take your money and move on. We want to be YOUR cleaners. The ones you recommend to your friends. The ones you trust with a spare key. The ones who remember how you like things done.
If you’ve been thinking about getting a cleaner or you’re just tired of spending your precious weekends scrubbing instead of enjoying this beautiful place we all get to call home… this is your sign. 🌊☀️
We’d be so grateful for the opportunity to look after you. 💙
📩 bookings@fiestafreshcleaning.com
📞 0485 975 021
